% check a.php
a.php:10:3: $name is of type: string (DEBUG)
a.php:13:3: $cnt is of type: int (DEBUG)

-- a.php --
<?php

class Foo
{
	private Stringable $str;

	public function hi()
	{
		$name = $this->str->toString();
		#debugType $name

		$cnt = $this->str->charCount();
		#debugType $cnt
	}
}
-- util.php --
<?php

interface Stringable
{
	public function toString(): string;

	function charCount(): int;
}
